Name: Stardew HDT Physics
Author: JosephsDeadish
Description: Zero-requirement plug-and-play physics mod: body jiggle, HDT hair, idle motion, and ragdoll-style knockback for farmers and humanoid NPCs. Optional GMCM support for in-game sliders and presets. Compatible with LewdEW, Valley Girls, XTardew, HornyFur, Anthro, and other sprite replacers.
